improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant by GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business decisions. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and professional support. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition and low entry point. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial mention and starting price creates urgency without misleading claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a powerful workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches and see the difference."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product by name and clearly states what it does, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the professional target audience. The free trial CTA reduces friction and encourages immediate engagement without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace for all your trade and business needs.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point—what happens at the paywall. It transparently explains the free-to-paid transition, reinforces accessible pricing, highlights the annual savings, and previews member benefits, reducing uncertainty and encouraging conversion.
